description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger A creature touches you, such as by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Grapple]{Grappling} you, successfully hitting you with an unarmed attack, or using a touch spell against you

Effect You secrete toxins from your flesh, dealing @Damage[ceil(@actor.level/2)d4[poison]] damage to the triggering creature, with a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell|basic] save against your class DC or spell DC, whichever is higher. At 3rd level and every 2 levels thereafter, this damage increases by 1d4.
